text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, it's time for the Arima Kinen, where the
best runners gather. Rice Shower says she was
able to become stronger thanks to Mihono
Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon feels the same. She learned a lot
about emotions thanks to Rice Shower's
unrelenting determination to keep going no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before, she never gave any thought to the
intention behind a handshake, but now she's the
one who extends a hand to Rice Shower.
